name: insurance brokers managing 10-20 policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers managing 10-20 policies/month, missed policy renewals cause coverage gaps. We send timely alerts instead of manual tracking of policy dates.
problem_solved: missed policy renewals leading to coverage gaps
